summary: The user sought advice on cleaning their bike and maintaining its performance, sharing that they have clocked 347 miles since the start of the year with a goal of reaching 1000 miles by the end of summer. They also inquired about bike shop recommendations for tune-ups and expressed interest in purchasing a Saris Bones 2-Bike Trunk Rack for an upcoming road trip to the mountains in June.
facts: The user has clocked 347 miles on their bike since the start of the year and aims to reach 1000 miles by the end of summer. The user has been meaning to get their bike tuned up again, noting it has been a month since the last tune-up. The user has had good experiences with a local bike shop downtown where they bought a Bell Zephyr helmet for $120. The user plans to schedule an appointment with the local bike shop for their next tune-up. The user is considering purchasing a Saris Bones 2-Bike Trunk Rack for easier bike transport on a road trip to the mountains planned for June.
